retrieval.query_summary: Find best bearish SMC setup for Crash 1000 Index based on HTF bearish trend and recent LTF BMS.

factors.name: Macro bias alignment
factors.notes: No macro data provided; treated as neutral/aligned.

factors.name: HTF structure aligned
factors.notes: D1, H12, H8, H6, H4, H3 timeframes are all confirmed bearish, aligning perfectly with the short setup.

factors.name: MTF BOS or ChoCH confirmed
factors.notes: H1 confirmed a fresh bearish BMS at 5484.535 at 10:00 UTC, providing strong confirmation of downside momentum.

factors.name: Valid Structural Entry Support
factors.notes: Setup targets a return to an unmitigated H1 Bearish Order Block at [5515.963, 5532.739].

factors.name: Liquidity sweep into entry zone
factors.notes: A sweep of BSL at 5570.955 occurred prior to the structural break, indicating a valid stop hunt.

factors.name: COT alignment with trade direction
factors.notes: No COT data available for this instrument.

factors.name: Wyckoff phase supports direction
factors.notes: No explicit Wyckoff phase data provided.

factors.name: No high-impact news within 30 minutes
factors.notes: Synthetic indices are not directly affected by macroeconomic news events.

factors.name: Minimum R:R achievable
factors.notes: The R:R to the final TP target is approximately 15.7R, far exceeding the 1:3 minimum for Intraday style.

cot_signal.summary: No COT data available for this instrument.

evidence.content_preview: Every entry must be inside or at a valid 4H or higher Supply/Demand zone or Order Block.

raw_response.explainable_reasoning: The analysis identifies a high-probability short opportunity on the Crash 1000 Index, driven by a strong bearish trend alignment across all timeframes from Daily down to M1. The selected setup is a live H1 CHOCH+BMS+LIQUIDITY_SWEEP+RTO pattern (candidate ID: ...253ea558), which has a high confluence score of 10 from the detection engine. A recent bearish Break of Market Structure (BMS) at 5484.535 confirms the immediate bearish order flow. The trade plan is to wait for a return to the unmitigated H1 Bearish Order Block between 5515.96 and 5532.74. A limit order will be placed in the OTE zone of this block [5519.48, 5524.36]. The stop loss is structurally placed at 5535.0, just above the OB high. Take profit targets are set at sequential areas of sell-side liquidity (SSL) on the H1 and D1 timeframes, offering an excellent R:R ratio of over 15:1 to the final target. The setup grade is 'A' with high confidence.

htf_bias.notes: The D1 timeframe is strongly bearish, having broken multiple swing lows. While W1 and MN1 show conflict, the dominant trend from D1 down to all LTFs is consistently bearish, providing a clear directional bias for intraday trading.

mtf_bias.notes: The H1 timeframe has a fresh bearish Break of Market Structure (BMS) at 5484.535, confirming immediate bearish order flow. This occurred after a bearish CHoCH at 5533.759, signaling a clear structural shift to the downside.

evidence.content_preview: SL must be structural — placed beyond the invalidation level of the setup (beyond OB, beyond QML, beyond swing high/low)

stop_loss.reason: Placed above the high of the H1 Bearish Order Block [5532.739], which is the structural invalidation point for this setup.
